## NYT::NFlow::TMoniumQuerySpec {#NYT_NFlow_TMoniumQuerySpec}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/monium/cpp/spec.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/monium/cpp/spec.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `name` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Query name. Used to identify the result in `response_per_query` and goes into the output stream in the `query_name` column. ||
|| `selector` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Metric selector in the format `{key="value", ...}`. The source passes it to the `Query.value` field of the `DataService.Read` request. ||
|#
